$comment: Shared bilingual-README contract (TenkaCloudChallenge#135). SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for how checkRequiredReadmes() must behave. The catalog runs scripts/readme-contract.test.ts against its own validate-problems.ts; the platform mirror (TenkaCloud#2254) ships this identical file plus the same test against ITS verbatim copy. If either copy of the validator drifts from these cases, that repo's CI fails; if this file itself differs between repos, the mirror/sync check catches it. Keep expectErrorSubstrings ASCII (the real messages contain an em dash after the substring).

cases.name: English README is a directory
expectErrorSubstrings: README.md must be a regular file

cases.name: English README is a symlink (not a real file)
expectErrorSubstrings: README.md must be a regular file
